• Ready for your Buzz?

    When you need ten different things done and you don’t have a clue, “WE” step in. When we say 360 Degree solutions, we sincerely mean it. From Branding to Marketing, Advertising to Public Relations or be it Your Web presence to the use of Alternate Media and it’s innovations.

    As we quote it, “Let’s not re-invent the wheel… let’s help it roll better”

Welcome to our Hive

Aboutwe work with big ideas and bigger passion

Our process is supported by a strong quality assurance at every step. We believe in testing our documents, designs, UI, plans & help manuals for standards, thus ensuring consistency in performance every time.

“Take up one idea. Make that one idea your life – think of it, dream of it, live on that idea. Let the brain, muscles, nerves, cells, every part of your body, be full of that single idea, and just leave every other idea alone. This is the way to success.

      –     CEO & Founder

Services

Creative Services

Business Planning

BudBee India Business Solutions redefine how businesses can modernize, innovate, and compete in a complex world. Are you ready to explore?

Yours Virtually

The Core focus of BudBee is to infuse technology into the Brand Communication and yet be gentle on the pockets. Everyone Deserves The New!

Byte Research & Development

Our Weavers help businesses to transform process into superior quality with most excellent efficiency, reliability and flexibility at manageable cost.

Digital Experts

At BudBee Digital Pad, we have on board dynamic professionals and ace marketers, helping us to be one of the few trusted Digital Marketing Agencies in Kolkata

Advertising & Eye-Candy

Up Your Brand Presence With Our Creative Services. We've shaped over 50 brands & counting. Result Oriented. Affordable Price. Expert Team.

Branding

With BudBee by your side, you can be known all over places for what you are & who you are. We create your identity, your brand and most importantly, your image.

Testimonials

Clients Review

A great team that combines capability with the right attitude! They are exactly who we were looking for as our marketing and branding partner - having the necessary skills to help with with everything starting from ideation to execution and the required professionalism to make sure the ball is never dropped no matter how pressing the deadline! Having worked with some of the world's leading organizations, I can safely say that the quality of Budbee's work is top notch. And the best part is that all of this is done with a smile - Our whole team loves working with them!

  • Saugata Banerjee
  • Biryanishk By THE BIRYANI COMPANY

Apt... Apt... Apt, the only word that comes to our mind for BudBee. The way our centre was launched and the "Buzz" created, we had inquiries even before the official launch of the centre &. We are always happy to recommend BudBee India. Wishing you guys all the very best and "Happy Buzzing"

  • Vishal Choudhary
  • Marketing Head - NIIT Park Circus

Working with budbee is great fun because it includes innovation and exchange of ideas. Always coming up with something new and the cooperation even in odd hours are the USPs of Budbee. Keep it up and all the best guys!!

  • Apollo Hospitals Marketing
  • Team Marketing

Finally wanted to thank Budbee for the lovely work for the past sometime. Really helping us stand out the competition. Thank you!

  • Kamalini Paul
  • Director, Paulson Hotel and Resorts Pvt Ltd.

We wanted someone to take care of our ideation as their own & we were glad to appoint BudBee as our communication agency. They knew exactly what we wanted and gave us solutions which promised good footfall. Good Luck to this young team of "Buddies" as they call themselves.

  • Debjiban Basu
  • Director - Basusree Cinemas

We had appointed BudBee to design our company logo We were extremely happy with the way we were spoilt with extremely creative options and we sealed the deal in a day, the most efficient dealing I have done till day. Recommendations on the way for this team...

  • Prithiviraj Dasgupta
  • Partner, Dial-a-Design
